channel.title: Matthew's Musings
channel.description: A collection of essays, personal reflections, notes, and books about what it means to be human in the age of AI, musings on faith and early Christianity, general contemplations, and whatever else I'm interested in at the moment.

item.title: God's Kingdom Already Present
item.description: A historical argument that Jesus proclaimed God's kingdom primarily as a present, collaborative, nonviolent transformation rather than an imminent apocalypse.

item.title: God's Kingdom Already Present (Short Version)
item.description: A concise historical case that Jesus proclaimed God's kingdom as a present transformation centered on healing, shared meals, social reversal, and justice.

item.title: Process Theology Quiz
item.description: An active-recall quiz on process theology, including divine dipolarity, actual occasions, prehension, freedom, evil, immortality, and religious language.

item.title: How to Read Cobb and Griffin's Process Theology as a Beginner
item.description: A beginner's guide to the Whiteheadian concepts needed to read Cobb and Griffin's Process Theology, explained in concrete and accessible language.
